title: Create Python/Rust example programs
description: Write runnable Python and Rust example files for each lesson (load, GSI, associations, pagination).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting example program work: will add runnable Python + Rust examples under examples/ and rust/examples for each lesson.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Added example programs under examples/sakila/python (01-05) and examples/sakila/rust (Cargo.toml + src/lib.rs + src/bin/01-05). Python run checks: 01_load_table.py and 05_pagination.py succeeded. Rust: cargo check --manifest-path examples/sakila/rust/Cargo.toml succeeded.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Follow-up: forced Python examples to use python backend (examples/sakila/python/common.py) to avoid Rust-PyO3 include deadlock; updated associations example fields list to retain nested customer include; reran all Python + Rust examples successfully.
